title: cheirostylis glandulosa
intro: Cheirostylis glandulosa, also known as the glandular cheirostylis, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Cheirostylis glandulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Cheirostylis glandulosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being.
